raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "One in four small businesses temporarily shut down because of the pandemic.",
    "Forty-three percent of surveyed businesses estimated they had less than six months before being forced to shutter permanently.",
    "Eighty-nine percent of the businesses surveyed had fewer than 20 employees.",
    "Businesses with less than 20 employees comprise over 88 percent of all businesses.",
    "Businesses with less than 20 employees employ approximately 18 percent of all workers.",
    "Net job growth was strongest among businesses with less than 20 employees."
```
